message:
feat(abi): add 34 Tier 7 symbols (SysV IPC, signal extras, network, exec variadic)

New symbols: lockf, posix_fallocate, posix_madvise, shmget/shmctl/shmat/shmdt,
semget/semctl/semop, msgget/msgctl/msgsnd/msgrcv (SysV IPC),
sigqueue/sigtimedwait/sigwaitinfo, getifaddrs/freeifaddrs,
ether_aton/ether_ntoa/ether_aton_r/ether_ntoa_r, herror/hstrerror,
execl/execlp/execle, if_nameindex/if_freenameindex,
getservbyname_r/getservbyport_r/gethostbyname_r/gethostbyaddr_r.
Total symbols: 821.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
